rows.query: get_top_markets sortBy volume category politics minLiquidity 100000 limit 5: return each market's title, currentPrice, volume24h, totalVolume, liquidity, conditionId, and url.
search_and_get_outcomes query "2026 FIFA World Cup winner" sortBy price: return the six highest-priced outcomes with name, price, volume, conditionId, tokenId, and eventUrl.

For the highest-liquidity live politics market right now, resolve it with get_top_markets sortBy liquidity category politics limit 1 and then run check_market_rules. Summarize resolvesYesIf, resolvesNoIf, resolutionSource, endDate, and every potentialGotchas entry.

Resolve the most liquid live crypto market with get_top_markets sortBy liquidity category crypto limit 1, then call get_market_parameters on its yesTokenId. Return title, yesTokenId, tickSize, feeRateBps, negRisk, and minOrderSize.

discover_trending_markets category sports limit 15: identify the single market with the strongest volumeVsAverage signal and report title, currentPrice, volume24h, volumeVsAverage, priceDirection, whyTrending, and trendScore.

find_moderate_probability_bets category politics minLiquidity 50000 sortBy volume limit 6: return the best six live contracts with market, currentPrice, impliedProbability, potentialReturn, liquidity, volume24h, endDate, and whyThisBet.
find_arbitrage_opportunities category sports limit 20: list any verified arbitrageOpportunities with totalCost below 0.995, plus the two widest wideSpreadMarkets with spread and midPrice.

summarize_live_market_activity category politics endingWithinDays 7 sortBy open_interest_vs_volume tradeLimit 20: report the selectedMarket, tradesSummary, openInterest.value, and explain whether the tape looks like fresh conviction or churn using only those tool outputs.
rows.alphaCategory: Trade tape, open interest, and live flow concentration

rows.query: find_trading_opportunities strategy mispriced category crypto minLiquidity 50000 depth medium: return the top five current opportunities with opportunityType, market, currentPrice, suggestedSide, potentialReturn, liquidity, volume24h, whyThisOpportunity, and riskFactors.

compare_event_outcome_quotes eventQuery "2026 FIFA World Cup winner" outcomes ["Spain","France","England"]: return matchedName, currentPrice, impliedProbability, bestBid, bestAsk, spread, spreadPercent, and volume for each outcome.

analyze_event_outcome_liquidity eventQuery "2026 FIFA World Cup winner" outcomes ["Spain","France","England"] category sports: for each analyzed outcome return matchedName, currentPrice, volume, spreadCents, totalDepthUsd, slippage5kPercent, canExit5k, and liquidityScore.

Use get_top_markets sortBy volume category sports limit 2 to resolve the top two live sports contracts, then run check_market_efficiency on both. Compare market, marketEfficiency.vig, marketEfficiency.efficiency, isEfficient, and YES-side trueProbabilitiesPercent side by side.

analyze_single_market_whales category politics hoursBack 24: on the auto-selected live market, compare whaleFlow.whaleActivity.sentiment, whaleFlow.divergence, holderAnalysis.smartMoneySignal.direction, holderAnalysis.marketConcentration, and say whether recent flow agrees with longer-horizon whale positioning.

Use search_and_get_outcomes query "2026 FIFA World Cup winner" sortBy volume, take the top six tokenIds, then call get_batch_orderbooks. Report each outcome's name, tokenId, bestBid, bestAsk, spread, bidDepth, askDepth, and flag which outcome has the tightest direct-book spread.

Use search_and_get_outcomes query "2026 FIFA World Cup winner" to get the eventSlug, then call get_event_by_slug and get_event_live_volume for that event id. Compare the top three submarkets by live volume share of the event total.
rows.alphaCategory: Trade tape, open interest, and live flow concentration

rows.query: Resolve the top-volume live politics market with get_top_markets sortBy volume category politics limit 1, then call polymarket_crossref_kalshi using its title and slug. Return the three best Kalshi candidates with title, ticker, yesPrice, volume24h, matchScore, rules, yesOutcomeMeans, and noOutcomeMeans.
rows.alphaCategory: Cross-venue contract equivalence and line mismatch

rows.query: Use get_top_markets sortBy liquidity category politics limit 1 to pick the most liquid live politics market, then run analyze_top_holders deepFetch true limit 20. Take the largest YES whale address and run get_user_positions on that wallet. Report the whale's address, positionValue in this market, tradingHistory.winRate, tradingHistory.totalRealizedPnL, totalClosedTrades, and whether this looks like skilled conviction or just large size.

build_high_conviction_workflow category sports candidateCount 8 topSetups 3 includeWhaleFlow true hoursBack 12: summarize workflowSummary and each top setup's score, signal, entryPlan, checks, whaleInsights, and risks.

Is now a good time to enter a $3,000 YES position on the highest-liquidity live crypto market? Use get_top_markets sortBy liquidity category crypto limit 1, then run check_market_rules, check_market_efficiency, and analyze_market_liquidity on that market. Give a go/no-go answer supported only by rulesSummary.potentialGotchas, trueProbabilities, spread.spreadBps, whaleCost.sell5k, and liquidityScore.
